summary: Iter-36 full backend + frontend regression for the 5-step refactor (HeroPanel/CategoryStrip/DishCard extraction, local-disk object storage for menu images, parallax tilt, Pure-Veg badge logo-first, thicker white login spacer, 3D login card). 10/10 backend pytest cases PASS (new upload endpoint + 403/401 + regressions). 9/9 frontend visual + integration checks PASS (parallax tilt confirmed via inline transform mutation after pointermove, badge first-child IS the pure-veg-logo IMG, spacer height=40px & bg=rgb(255,255,255), login-card-3d carries multi-layer box-shadow, OTP send+verify works end-to-end).
critical_code_review_comments: HeroPanel.jsx: pointermove listener is attached only on the <header>; works in real browsers but page.mouse.move from automation does not bubble synthetic pointer events to the React-managed ref — verified instead by dispatching PointerEvent directly. No code change needed, but worth knowing for future Playwright tests of this component.

/api/admin/restaurant/menu/upload-image correctly validates content_type, enforces 4MB cap (413), returns {url,bytes} and the file is GET-able via the StaticFiles mount with image/* content-type. Round-trip bytes match.
Restaurant.jsx now ~280 lines (down from 480) with HeroPanel/CategoryStrip/DishCard extracted — well under the 700-line threshold.
Login page spacer is h-7 sm:h-10 w-full bg-white (computed height 40px, bg rgb(255,255,255)). login-card-3d class is present and computed box-shadow is a 6-layer composite — 3D depth wired correctly.

Minor: 401 console errors from /api/restaurant/orders for anonymous /restaurant viewers persist (pre-existing, expected, caught client-side); consider gating the call with `if (user)` to silence devtools noise.
test_credentials: OTP DEV mode — admin phone 9970705391 (in ADMIN_PHONES), regular user 9876543210. dev_otp returned by /api/auth/send-otp.
seed_data_creation: None — generated a 70-byte valid 1x1 PNG in-test for the upload, and an over-sized 4MB+1KB buffer for the 413 check. Test upload files remain in /app/backend/uploads/menu_images/ but are uuid-named and harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features of iteration 36 are verified working in both backend and frontend on viewport 1280x900. Pure-Veg badge: first child is IMG[data-testid=pure-veg-logo], followed by middle-dot · then '100% Pure Veg' text. Parallax tilt: inner div carries `transform: perspective(900px) rotateX(...) rotateY(...)` that updates to non-zero values after pointermove (verified 2.09deg / 2.79deg after dispatchEvent). Login spacer testid login-hero-spacer has class 'h-7 sm:h-10 w-full bg-white' and computed height=40px/bg=white. login-form-card has class login-card-3d with a 6-layer box-shadow (inset highlight + inset bottom edge + ambient + drop + heavy floor + ring). /api/admin/restaurant/menu/upload-image returns {url:'/api/uploads/menu_images/<uuid>.<ext>', bytes:N} and the URL is publicly GET-able via the StaticFiles mount. Non-admin gets 403, anonymous gets 401. Restaurant menu/theme regression endpoints untouched. Existing critical flows (category filter 6→1 active, add-to-cart cart-bar shows '1 item · ₹380', search filter shows restaurant-no-items, login OTP send shows DEV MODE OTP banner) all work.
